tasks.title: Extend prd-data-schema.json with core spine
tasks.description: Add required core fields to prd-data-schema.json: schema_version, source, title, slug, created, summary, decisions[], open_threads[], next_action. Mark all feature limbs (user_stories, implementation_decisions, testing_decisions, success_metrics, out_of_scope, risks_and_tradeoffs, evidence, further_notes) as optional. Consumers ignore unknown fields, so additive change is backward-compatible with existing seeds and PRDs.
acceptance_criteria: prd-data-schema.json includes schema_version, source, summary, decisions[], open_threads[], next_action as required fields
All feature limbs are marked optional in the schema
Existing .html PRDs that lack core spine fields still pass extract-prd-json.sh (backward compat verified manually)

tasks.title: Extend extract-prd-json.sh: .json passthrough + schema validation
tasks.description: Add .json input handling to extract-prd-json.sh: passthrough (emit as-is). Add schema validation against prd-data-schema.json for all input types (.html, .md, .json). Fail loud on malformed input with a clear error message. A bad seed must be caught at this normalizer, not inside to-tasks or any downstream skill.
acceptance_criteria: extract-prd-json.sh accepts .json input and emits it unchanged if valid
extract-prd-json.sh validates .html and .md inputs against updated schema (no regression)
Malformed input causes a non-zero exit with a clear error message
Valid legacy .html PRDs still pass without modification

tasks.title: Write to-seed skill
tasks.description: Create claude-code-shared/skills/to-seed/SKILL.md. The skill distills the in-context conversation or grill session into a standardized JSON IR using the prd-data shape plus core spine. Interaction model: zero content-forking prompts, no theme prompt, no dir-confirm prompt, no context-loader. Exactly one branch sanity-check that leads with the current branch (confirm / switch existing / create new), reusing to-prd-html's git switch logic. Writes docs/seeds/<ts>-<slug>.json via doc-filename.sh <slug> json (or task-filename.sh equivalent). Post-write fan-out menu offers: /to-prd-html <seed>, /to-tasks <seed>, /prototype, Nothing. Never commits. Usable standalone in any conversation, not only grill sessions.
acceptance_criteria: SKILL.md exists at claude-code-shared/skills/to-seed/SKILL.md
Skill writes a valid JSON file to docs/seeds/ conforming to prd-data-schema.json
Interaction requires exactly one prompt (branch sanity-check) with zero content-forking
Post-write fan-out menu is present and offers the correct options
Skill never commits any artifact
Skill is usable standalone (not grill-only)

tasks.title: Refactor to-prd-html into pure renderer
tasks.description: Refactor to-prd-html so it accepts a seed .json path as input, reads the JSON, fills the HTML template, and writes the HTML output. Drop the synthesize-from-conversation path entirely. Omit any section whose source field is empty or absent so partial seeds (core-only) render zero empty blocks. The embedded prd-data JSON in the output HTML must round-trip through extract-prd-json.sh unchanged.
acceptance_criteria: to-prd-html SKILL.md takes a seed .json path as its primary input
Synthesize-from-conversation path is removed
A partial seed (core spine only, no feature limbs) renders no empty section blocks
A full seed renders all sections correctly
Embedded prd-data JSON in output HTML round-trips through extract-prd-json.sh

tasks.title: Update to-tasks discovery to list docs/seeds/*
tasks.description: In to-tasks SKILL.md step 1 (Locate the PRD), add docs/seeds/*.json to the discovery listing alongside docs/prd/*.html and docs/prd/*.md. When /to-tasks is invoked with a seed path argument (from to-seed fan-out), discovery is bypassed and the path is used directly. Ingestion call unchanged (extract-prd-json.sh normalizer handles .json passthrough).
acceptance_criteria: Step 1 of to-tasks SKILL.md lists docs/seeds/*.json in the file discovery
User can select a .json seed from the list and to-tasks proceeds normally
Ingestion call (extract-prd-json.sh) is unchanged
Direct path argument bypasses discovery (when supplied from to-seed fan-out)

tasks.title: Collapse grill-me + grill-with-docs session-end menus
tasks.description: Update both grill-me and grill-with-docs SKILL.md files. Replace the session-end menu options 'Create a PRD' and 'Create a task file' with a single 'Create a seed' option (plus 'Nothing yet'). The PRD/tasks/prototype fan-out now lives in to-seed after the seed is written. Do not add any other menu options.
acceptance_criteria: grill-me session-end menu offers exactly: 'Create a seed' and 'Nothing yet'
grill-with-docs session-end menu offers exactly: 'Create a seed' and 'Nothing yet'
'Create a PRD' and 'Create a task file' are removed from both menus
'Create a seed' invokes /to-seed

tasks.title: Register to-seed in model-tiers.json
tasks.description: Run /register-skill to-seed to add to-seed to the model-tiers.json skills map at the sonnet/xhigh tier. Verify the tier advisory, weekly usage report, and sync all recognize to-seed after registration.
acceptance_criteria: to-seed appears in model-tiers.json at sonnet/xhigh tier
/register-skill completed without error
Tier advisory fires for /to-seed in a new session

tasks.title: Tighten browser_verify guidance in to-tasks SKILL.md
tasks.description: Reduce the browser_verify block in to-tasks SKILL.md from ~245 words to 170 words or fewer. Preserve every rule: url_path semantics, assertion concreteness, omit-entirely rule for non-UI tasks, dynamic route :param placeholder rules, and the browser-checker resolution note. No rules dropped, no new rules added.
acceptance_criteria: browser_verify block in to-tasks SKILL.md is 170 words or fewer
All existing rules are preserved (url_path, assertions, omit rule, dynamic :param, browser-checker note)
No new rules introduced
Word count verified by wc -w on the isolated block

follow_ups.title: Run /improve-skill to-seed with fidelity-dominant rubric
steps: After T-0003 and T-0007 are complete, open a conversation and run: /improve-skill to-seed
Configure rubric axes: no-fabrication (high weight), decided-vs-open separation (high weight), no dropped decisions (high weight), full grounding (high weight), prose style (low weight)
Schema validity must be a hard pass/fail gate: any seed that fails extract-prd-json.sh validation scores zero
Run eval scenarios spanning: feature conversation, architecture decision, bug investigation, vague/exploratory, multi-topic
Verify non-feature scenarios do NOT fabricate user_stories or success_metrics to fill optional limbs
Confirm overall score before relying on the skill in production

follow_ups.title: Run /improve-skill to-tasks after browser_verify tightening
steps: After T-0008 is complete, run: /improve-skill to-tasks
Confirm behavioral score holds at 92 or above
If any assertion score drops below threshold, revert T-0008 changes to to-tasks SKILL.md
Re-run /improve-skill to-tasks after revert to confirm baseline is restored

follow_ups.title: Verify end-to-end: to-seed to to-tasks pipeline
steps: After T-0003 and T-0005 are complete, open a real conversation (not synthetic) and run: /to-seed
Confirm docs/seeds/<timestamp>-<slug>.json is written and passes: ~/.dotfiles/claude-code-shared/skills/to-tasks/scripts/extract-prd-json.sh <seed-path>
From the to-seed fan-out menu, select /to-tasks <seed-path>
Confirm to-tasks step 1 shows the seed in its discovery listing
Confirm the output tasks JSON has its prd field pointing at the seed file path
Verify no divergent codepath: extract-prd-json.sh is the only ingestion call
